candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A line appears in the operating section, but it sits beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' alongside other COGS components/balancing lines, so it appears embedded within that selected total rather than separate from it.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the parent total 'Cost of goods sold'. 'Amort/Impairment in COR/COGS' looks like a component of that total, so adding it separately would risk double counting.

candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line, but it appears directly under the selected parent row 'Selling expenses' and therefore looks like a sub-component already included in that selected bucket.

This is an explicit SG&A-related D&A line, but it appears under the selected overhead structure and is best interpreted as a component within the selected SG&A buckets rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket already includes 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses' as parent operating expense rows. The visible amortization rows appear nested as components of those selected rows, so no separate XSGA_DA should be added. No explicit 'Amortization in R&D' row is present.
